svg.title: G logo in Google colors
svg.desc: The letter G styled in three Google brand colors: blue on top, red in the middle, green on the bottom, on a transparent background

text.style: fill:rgb(66, 133, 244);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", "Century Gothic", "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:280px;font-weight:700;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

fill:rgb(234, 67, 53);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", "Century Gothic", "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:280px;font-weight:700;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

fill:rgb(52, 168, 83);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Arial Rounded MT Bold", "Century Gothic", "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif;font-size:280px;font-weight:700;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
